chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1077 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 24-12-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** Petitioners as well as their counsel are called absent; no intimation has been received so far, same was the position on three preceding consecutive dates of hearing, when, in the interest of justice, time was granted for compliance with office objections; however, the same have not been complied with. This reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in pursuing the instant petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
